name: Blue Fish with Oranges and Oregano Flowers in Cartoccio
recipeIngredient: 4 pieces blue fish fillet (1-1/2 pounds total)
1 cup oregano flowers, or other late summer herb flowers
1 medium red onion, sliced paper thin
2 bunches Italian parsley, finely chopped, to yield 1/2 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cut 4 pieces parchment paper into 16-inch square pieces. Grease each piece of parchment with 1 tablespoon olive oil.
3. Season blue fish with salt and pepper. Place the fish just right in the center of each piece of parchment.
4. Divide orange segments, oregano flowers, and red onion evenly over the 4 blue fish fillets. Sprinkle parsley on top.
5. Fold the left half of the parchment over and crimp the edges to seal completely.
6. Place the parcels on a baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes.
7. Carefully open each parcel with scissors or a knife, and serve immediately.
8. Yield: 4 servings
